PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, RONALD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PATEL, OVASE PATEL, NASSAH PLAINTIFF;S SECURITY DEPOSIT IS OFFSET BY RENT DUE AT THE TIME OF THE END OF HIS TENANCY.
